data.description: `src/components/beat-table-metadata.tsx:168-201` resolves agent fields by trying `agentname` then `agentName` then `agent_name` (and same for model and version). This is a symptom of inconsistent stamping at the source. Knots stamps notes/handoffs with `agentname` and steps with `agent_name` — each artifact type uses ONE key. The fix is at the read site: pick the right canonical key for the artifact being read. See parent foolery-2e97 rule 6 (one function per task, no duplicate branches).
